protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: cells were collected, and the lysates were subjected to Dual-Luciferase Reporter assay

protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: lysed ... with DISC IP buffer containing Triton-X-100 ... RIPA buffer containing SDS ... subjected ... to WB analysis

protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: cell lysates in DISC IP buffer ... centrifugated ... pellets were resuspended in RIPA buffer ... analyzed using WB

protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: cells were lysed in DISC IP buffer, and the cell lysates were cleared with centrifugation ... subjected to WB analysis

protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: cells were lysed in DISC IP buffer and cleared with centrifugation; soluble fractions were subjected to WB

protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: Using RIPA buffer, we identified an increased DISC IP buffer-insoluble 3CLpro

protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: cells were lysed in passive lysis buffer; luciferase activities were measured using Dual-Glo Luciferase Assay System

protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: RNA from these HEK293T cells was isolated by TRIzol Reagent; cDNA was used for qPCR

protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: Cellular fractionation: cells were lysed in DISC IP buffer; lysates were clarified with centrifugation; pellet was washed and dissolved in RIPA buffer.

protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: Gel filtration: cells were lysed in DISC IP buffer; lysates were clarified with centrifugation and further fractionated, then analyzed by western blotting.

protocols.Paper_title: Oxidative stress transforms 3CLpro into an insoluble and more active form to promote SARS-CoV-2 replication
protocols.Evidence: Immunoprecipitation: cells were lysed in DISC IP buffer; lysates were clarified with centrifugation; complexes were washed and analyzed by western blotting.
